The chief attendant appears eager to retain your services.

The chief attendant appears eager to retain your services.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
The chief attendant remains concerned that his shorthanded staff will fail to meet the demands of the campaign crowd. He bids you report to the guides responsible for hospitality in Event Square, Round Square, or Wonder Square, and put yourself at the disposal of the Saucer's guests.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
